name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Fillable cover page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA. Contains fields for purpose, effective date, MNDA term, term of confidentiality, governing law, jurisdiction, modifications, and party signatures.

name: Mutual NDA Standard Terms
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement Version 1.0, covering confidential information definitions, use and protection obligations, exceptions, required disclosures, term, termination, return of information, proprietary rights, disclaimer, governing law, equitable relief, and general provisions.

name: Mutual NDA README
description: Overview and FAQ for the Common Paper Mutual NDA: how the agreement was created, versioning policy, usage instructions, and license information.
